summary: Iter 6 Christ Church microsite full frontend verification. All 13 sections in correct order, side nav has 13 dots, NO [VERIFY] or [ASSET NEEDED] anywhere in rendered text. TodaysCedar (background video + wood-shake line + 5-row lifecycle chart with exact Brava/Metal/Asphalt/Concrete/NaturalCedar rows), FieldInspection (4 featured + 42 rail, no captions), BravaProof (real drone video src, hickman bg loop, beauty-conscience panel, 9 LL thumbs, 1 quote card, Class 4 + Mineral Pigmented badges, no 'Class A' in brava row), LightStudy (color-for-life panel with correct copy before scrubber), RoofSystem (etymology headline with role=definition + aria-describedby matching, 5 standards badges: Class 4 / 188 MPH / Class A / CRRC / Miami-Dade + Source caption), NewApproach (exists between attention & roadmap, vertical 9/16 video, max-width 420px), RoadMap ('Christ Church Success Road Map' headline + BRAVA-installer pill on step 04), HumanClose (coppergate-window-install video + PDF link returns 200 application/pdf), NO GiveBack section. All key asset URLs return 200/206 on curl. Console is error-free on full page scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: All [VERIFY] and [ASSET NEEDED] placeholder strings have been cleanly removed from all section JSX files as requested.

RoofSystem headline innerText reads 'Roof Systemsystem(noun)·a set of components engineered to perform as one.' because the headline and the definition tag are siblings inside the same <h*> element (aria-describedby correctly links them). This is semantically correct and renders visually separated per design, but note that a screen reader may read the definition inline with the headline. Acceptable.

Playwright's requestfailed log shows a handful of ERR_ABORTED entries on video files (coppergate, mccue drone, hickman, new-approach, snape, hero-timeline) and one webp (team-photo) — curl confirms all return HTTP 200/206. These are normal browser-aborted range/preload requests when multiple background videos load simultaneously during scroll, NOT 404s.
Headline for RoadMap is 'Christ Church\nSuccess Road Map.' (linebreak between 'Church' and 'Success') — matches design intent; substring 'Christ Church' + 'Success Road Map' both present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 6 passed 100% on all 27 acceptance checks. DOM order, side-nav, asset sources, aria plumbing, section counts (featured=4, rail=42, standards=5, lifecycle rows=5, LL thumbs=9, quote cards=1) all verified. If new iteration changes assets, re-run /app/test_reports/iteration_6 style checks plus curl the asset URLs to distinguish ERR_ABORTED from actual 404s. Preview URL: https://brava-restoration.preview.emergentagent.com/.
